items.q: Verified has been a great asset to our recruiting efforts for several years. They have the most complete information in the industry and serve as the foundation for our prospect database.
items.name: Andy Frank

items.q: Verified helps us find players who fit our program with speed and efficiency. With help from Verified, we offered 5 transfers and signed all 5.
items.name: John Lorenzo
items.role: Associate Head Coach, Wright State Women's Basketball

items.q: Amount and quality of contact information and data is everything. Verified has provided this more accurately than any other recruiting tool we have used.
items.name: Brad Spencer
items.role: Head Coach, North Central College Football (D3)

items.q: Our staff trusts Verified for day-one contact accuracy. It cut our prep time before every recruiting trip.
items.name: Marcus Reid
items.role: Director of Recruiting, Coastal Carolina Baseball

items.q: The transfer portal moves fast. Verified keeps our board current so we are never reacting a week late.
items.name: Elena Vasquez
items.role: Head Coach, San Diego State Women's Soccer

items.q: We use Verified as the single source of truth for prospect contact data across the entire staff.
items.name: Tom Hartley

items.q: Film, academics, and fit matter—but you cannot evaluate a kid you cannot reach. Verified solves that first step.
items.name: Priya Nair
items.role: Associate Head Coach, Davidson Men's Basketball

items.q: Verified Athletics gave our coordinators a shared workflow. Less spreadsheet chaos, more actual recruiting.
items.name: Chris O'Malley

items.q: The depth of roster and coaching-staff data is unmatched for programs at our level.
items.name: Jordan Ellis

items.q: We signed three portal players last cycle who surfaced first in Verified. That alone paid for the platform.
items.name: Morgan Blake

items.q: My assistants spend less time verifying numbers and more time building relationships with prospects.
items.name: David Cho

items.q: Verified is the first place we look when we need a clean export for a staff meeting or compliance review.
items.name: Rachel Kim
items.role: Director of Operations, George Mason Women's Basketball

items.q: For a mid-major program, speed wins. Verified helps us identify fits before bigger schools crowd the prospect.
items.name: Nate Sullivan

items.q: Our international recruiting improved because contact paths and staff routing are actually reliable.
items.name: Amara Diallo

items.q: I recommend Verified to every coach who is still juggling three different data sources every Monday morning.
items.name: Greg Finley

items.q: The platform scales from our GA level to my office—we all see the same board and the same numbers.
items.name: Hannah Ortiz

items.q: Verified helped us reorganize a chaotic transfer class into a clear priority list in one afternoon.
items.name: Kevin Marsh

items.q: We have used other services. None of them kept our CRM and our on-field staff aligned the way Verified does.
items.name: Lisa Tran

items.q: Prospect coverage is broad enough for our staff, but the filters keep us focused on athletes we can actually recruit.
items.name: Mike Donovan

items.q: Every cycle we lean on Verified for the first wave of outreach. It is consistent and audit-friendly.
items.name: Sara Whitcomb

items.q: Our hitting coaches use the academic and roster context alongside contact data—huge for junior college transfers.
items.name: Tyler Boone

items.q: Verified is not just a database. It is how we run weekly recruiting meetings with confidence.
items.name: Angela Pierce

items.q: When the NCAA calendar tightens, we need tools that respect compliance boundaries. Verified does.
items.name: James Corbin

items.q: We plugged Verified into our existing process without retraining the whole staff—it just worked.
items.name: Nina Kowalski
items.role: Director of Recruiting, Cleveland State Women's Basketball

items.q: The best compliment I can give: our boosters notice less chaos and more signed classes.
items.name: Robert Gaines

items.q: Verified helps us balance high school, JUCO, and portal pipelines without losing track of anyone.
items.name: Carla Mendes

items.q: I have coached for twenty years. Verified is the first platform I have seen the entire staff adopt willingly.
items.name: Phil Andersen

items.q: We use sport-agnostic tags for staff-wide testimonials, but sport filters still surface the right quotes for visits.
items.name: Verified Athletics Staff

items.q: From initial call to signed agreement, the Verified team understood how recruiting offices actually operate.
items.name: Diane Harper

items.q: If you are building a modern recruiting operation, start with clean data. Verified is that foundation for us.
items.name: Victor Lam
items.role: Head Coach, Sacramento State Men's Basketball
